purpose: People Also Ask refresh record for SMI Roofing FAQ publishing batches. Update this file before publishing each city/service FAQ batch so page questions stay tied to live search demand.
refresh_rule: Before publishing a new FAQ batch, pull current People Also Ask or related-question data for each city/service target, record the source queries and questions here, then localize selected questions into visible FAQs and run node scripts/sync-faq-schema.mjs --write.
acceptable_sources: Google People Also Ask manual capture
Current search-result question refresh when PAA is unavailable

source_notes.note: Opened during the 2026-06-01 refresh. The page showed a May 26, 2026 update, Russellville replacement cost data, and FAQ questions about labor cost, weather, roof damage causes, timing, and storm-related claims.
Opened during the 2026-06-01 refresh. The 2026 repair guide confirmed active leak cost, repair escalation risk, and repair-versus-replacement question demand.
Opened during the 2026-06-01 refresh. The 2026 comparison page confirmed questions around upfront cost, long-term value, standing seam, exposed fasteners, and metal roof lifespan.
Opened during the 2026-06-01 refresh. The 2026 inspection guide confirmed biannual and post-storm inspection questions, TPO/EPDM focus, and maintenance ROI demand.
Re-opened during the 2026-06-01 refresh. Official Arkansas Insurance Department guidance confirmed deductible threshold, photo documentation, contractor vetting, and deductible-waiver cautions.
Opened during the 2026-06-01 refresh. The page showed a May 13, 2026 review date and confirmed questions about roofer attendance, documentation, adjuster scope, depreciation release, and supplements.

batches.source_method: Current web search/PAA-style refresh using priority city and service queries on 2026-06-01. Public search-result question sources were used under the accepted fallback when direct Google PAA panel capture was unavailable in the local environment. No visible FAQ content was published in this maintenance pass.
source_queries: roof replacement cost Russellville AR questions roof replacement Arkansas 2026
roof repair Russellville AR leaking roof repair cost insurance hail questions
storm damage roof repair Arkansas insurance claim hail roof questions
commercial roofing Russellville AR TPO roof repair inspection questions
metal roof Arkansas questions worth it hail noise standing seam exposed fastener 2026
roof insurance claim Arkansas questions adjuster recoverable depreciation supplement deductible storm damage

paa_questions: How much does a roof replacement cost in {city}, {state}?
What factors change a roof replacement price in {city}?
Should I repair or replace an older roof in {city}?
How does Arkansas weather affect roof lifespan?
Is a metal roof more expensive than shingles in {city}?
question_sets.publishing_notes: Use only supported pricing ranges, and add city weather or housing-stock context before publishing.

paa_questions: What should I do if my roof is leaking in {city}?
How much does roof leak repair cost in {city}?
Can a leaking roof be repaired instead of replaced?
When does a roof repair turn into replacement?
Will insurance pay for roof repair after wind or hail?
How soon should a small roof leak be inspected?
question_sets.publishing_notes: Add local symptoms such as hail, wind, tree cover, or heavy rain when accurate.

paa_questions: Should I have my roof inspected after hail in {city}?
What does hail damage look like on shingles?
Should I call insurance or a roofer first after storm damage in Arkansas?
What roof damage should I document before filing a claim?
What if my roof damage is below my deductible?
How long do I have to complete replacement-cost roof repairs after a covered loss?
question_sets.publishing_notes: Keep insurance language neutral. SMI documents roof facts; the carrier and policy decide coverage.

paa_questions: Can a roofer meet the insurance adjuster at my {city} home?
What documents should I have ready for a roof adjuster meeting?
What is recoverable depreciation on a roof claim?
Can SMI help if my roof claim is underpaid?
What is a supplement on a roof insurance claim?
Do I have to pay my deductible for a storm damage roof claim?
question_sets.publishing_notes: Do not promise approvals, waived deductibles, or coverage outcomes.

paa_questions: Is a metal roof worth it in {city}?
Is standing seam metal better than exposed-fastener metal roofing?
Does a metal roof cost more than shingles in Arkansas?
Can hail damage a metal roof?
Are metal roofs loud when it rains?
question_sets.publishing_notes: Mention HOA, heat, hail, or rural property exposure only when it is accurate for the city.

paa_questions: How often should a commercial roof be inspected?
Should a commercial roof be inspected after severe weather?
Can regular commercial roof maintenance delay replacement?
Which commercial roof system is best for my {city} building?
Can a roof coating cost less than replacement?
How much does commercial roofing cost in Arkansas?
question_sets.publishing_notes: Localize by property type, such as warehouse, school, church, retail, medical, industrial, or multifamily.

publishing_checklist: Replace every {city}, {state}, and service token before publishing.
Select 4-6 questions per page, prioritizing the freshest PAA questions.
Use the FAQ answer library as a draft only; localize every answer.
Run node scripts/sync-faq-schema.mjs --write after visible FAQ edits.
Run npm run validate:paa-refresh and npm run validate:faq-library before commit.
